Name: AWS - Find Blue-Green ASG
Description: Return the name of the online and offline blue and green Auto Scaling Groups

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.InactiveColor
Parameters.Label: Inactive Color
Parameters.HelpText: The color of the inactive group (Green or Blue). This value is usually found from the "AWS - Find Blue-Green Target Group" step.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.GreenASG
Parameters.Label: Green ASG Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the green auto scaler group. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/autoscaling/ec2/userguide/auto-scaling-groups.html for more details.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.BlueASG
Parameters.Label: Blue ASG Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the blue auto scaler group. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/autoscaling/ec2/userguide/auto-scaling-groups.html for more details.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.Region
Parameters.Label: Region
Parameters.HelpText: The AWS region. See https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/global-infrastructure/regions_az/ for more information.
